start: ^STUDENT: Hey! You look familiar. Are you a new student here?
continue_1: ^PLAYER: Yeah, I just enrolled this week. Still trying to find my way around.
continue_2: ^STUDENT: Nice! Have you gotten your university ID yet?
continue_3: ^PLAYER: Not yet. I heard I need to get it at the University Press?
continue_4: ^STUDENT: That’s right! They handle all the student IDs there.
continue_5: ^PLAYER: Oh, okay. Do I need anything to get it processed?
continue_6: ^STUDENT: Yep! You’ll need to bring your COR — that’s your Certificate of Registration.
continue_7: ^PLAYER: Oh, I already have mine here.
continue_09: ^STUDENT: Great! hand it over to the BukSU press and the process is quick — they’ll just verify it and take your picture.
continue_10: ^PLAYER: Sounds easy enough. Thanks for the help!
continue_11: ^STUDENT: No problem! Welcome to the university, by the way.
continue_12: ^PLAYER: Thanks! Hope to see you around campus.
